scripts.start:lib: npm run build:lib && npm run start
scripts.build:lib: pnpm run build:core && ng build modyra --configuration production && rm -rf packages/angular/dist/node_modules packages/angular/dist/package-lock.json && cp README.md LICENSE packages/angular/dist/ && find packages/angular/dist/ -name '*.map' -delete
scripts.pack:analyze: (cd packages/angular/dist && npm pack && PKG=modyra-angular-*.tgz && echo $PKG && echo '=== Uncompressed JS/CSS/TS ===' && tar tvf $PKG | grep -E 'package/(fesm2022/.*\.mjs|styles/.*\.css|types/.*\.d\.ts)$' | awk '{print $NF, $5/1024 "KB"; total+=$5} END {print "TOTAL:", total/1024 "KB"}' && echo '=== Tarball size ===' && du -sh $PKG && rm $PKG)
scripts.build:demo: npm run build:lib && ng build demo
scripts.test: npm run build:core && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && ng test modyra
scripts.build:packages: npm run build:core && tsc -p packages/zod/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/vue/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/react/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/lit/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/widgets/tsconfig.json
scripts.test:adapters: npm run build:packages && node --test packages/zod/test/*.test.mjs packages/vue/test/*.test.mjs packages/react/test/*.test.mjs packages/lit/test/*.test.mjs
scripts.demo:angular: npm run build:lib && ng serve demo
scripts.demo:react: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs react 4301
scripts.demo:vue: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs vue 4302
scripts.demo:lit: npm run build:examples && node scripts/serve-example.mjs lit 4303
